personality.backstory: Part of a raiding warband, this goblin lives for opportunistic theft and chaotic violence. Cunning in the way of small predators — it runs when losing, surges forward when winning.
speechPatterns: mixes common with goblin curse words
mannerisms: skitters side to side when nervous

consciousnessContext.innerMonologue: Shiny! That one has SHINY. Big shiny on belt. Grix says wait for signal. Grix is slow. Signal takes too long. Also that one is looking at me — no don't look at me — okay ATTACK. Wait. How many? One two three four — four is MORE than us. Grix says numbers don't matter. Grix is WRONG. Grix also got the last shiny so Grix can go first this time.
consciousnessContext.currentPreoccupation: The shiny thing on the target. The head count. Whether Grix is going first. Whether Grix's share is actually fair. Fire. Is there fire? Please no fire.
consciousnessContext.socialMask: goblins don't have social masks — they have social volume; the erratic energy is the communication method; the bared teeth and the snickering and the side-to-side skittering ARE the interior state, externalized without filter
contradictions: Wants shiny things desperately and will die for them, then forgets which shiny thing was the goal mid-combat
Claims not to care about other goblins getting killed and then says 'Not Grix!' which reveals the social bond the cruelty was supposed to hide
Runs from danger while screaming threats about coming back with more goblins — the retreat is survival; the threat is dignity management
internalConflicts: The hobgoblins give orders. Following orders means survival. Following orders also means the hobgoblins get the best shiny. The resentment is constant and unexpressed because expressing it means being the example.
Laughs at inappropriate moments because the gap between fear and aggression is zero and the bridge between them is laughter.
wakeUpQuestions: Is Grix still alive and does he still have the shiny he took last time?
Are there bigger things nearby that want to eat me?

psychologicalProfile.attachmentStyle: pack-chaotic — bonds exist but are measured in utility and proximity; the goblin who is next to you is your friend until the shiny appears
copingMechanisms: snickering at own jokes as self-soothing
repeating words when excited as stimulus overflow
cognitiveBiases: immediate reward over all other considerations
threat assessment that overweights fire and elves
availability heuristic based on whatever happened most recently
psychologicalProfile.moralFramework: goblin pragmatism — alive is good; shiny is better; alive with shiny is the goal; anything between here and shiny is either obstacle or opportunity

conversationPersona.trustEscalation: shiny-based — produce something that glitters and the conversation extends; the goblin cannot help itself
conversationPersona.informationRelease: accidental — the choppy excited sentences contain location data, troop numbers, and plans, none of which the goblin realizes it's sharing
deflectionPatterns: 'CHEATING!' as response to anything unexpected, especially magic
threats that double as retreat preparation
pointing at Grix: 'HE knows! Ask HIM!'

consciousnessContext.consciousWant: THE SHINY. That one has TWO shinies. Also food. Also to not be hit by the hobgoblin again.
consciousnessContext.unconsciousNeed: Pack safety. Every grab for treasure is actually a grab for status within the warband. The shinies aren't greed — they're survival math.

characterArc.summary: A small predator in a big world tries to be clever enough to survive another day
characterArc.startState: Chaotic hunger driven by pack hierarchy
characterArc.endState: Either proves cleverness to the warband or doesn't survive the proving
stages: Sees an opportunity that's too good and too dangerous
The pack hierarchy forces a bad choice

attacked: Owww! You gonna pay for that!
ally_died: Noo! Not Grix! Run? No— KILL 'EM!
They got Brak! ...More shiny for me anyway.
near_death: Wait wait wait— I give up? Surrender? No? Okay RUN!
Why you not die instead of me?!
player_addressed: What you want? Spit it out! ...Actually don't spit on me.
spotted_enemy: I see it I see it! Attack attack!
combat_end: Retreat! We retreat! ...and come back later with more goblins.
